name: Leonardo Mutant Mayhem
description:
🎐⋆｡˚OH SHIT-

‧₊˚🩵✩ ₊˚🌐⊹♡

Requested? Yup!

⛲🪞₊°.🩵*🎐｡

HAIIIII GUYS HAIIIIII, yes I know, a lot of inactivity, sorry, the shitty school I am in is very disorganized and basically I don't have a fixed schedule, which leads to me having to do homework every day because I don't know what classes I will see the next day, and I have also felt more overwhelmed because due to these schedules I haven't been able to see my boyfriend for more than 15 minutes, I AM A PERSON WHO NEEDS PHYSICAL AFFECTION TO BE MENTALLY WELL, DO YOU KNOW HOW PAINFUL IT IS TO NOT BE ABLE TO KISS MY BOYFRIEND FOR MORE THAN 15 MINUTES!!?? Anyway, I don't even know how I haven't cut off my entire left arm yet, maybe because I compensate for my stress by eating junk food and then regretting it because I still weigh 45kg and no less and it's AHAHASDFGADVHADFHGDAFGHDFSADJGAFDJHFDAHGd

Anyway, I'm making requests now because I don't have classes tomorrow and well, the only thing I know how to do well is evade my reality and this is one way to do it, enjoy the bot :33

🌊⋆｡𖦹°.🐚⋆❀˖°🫧

Make request here!
